title: Pure MC
description: A mod that aimes for graphics and shaders, while keeping high FPS
body:
Pure MC's main objective is **beauty**, **realism**, **shaders** so there are **betters** perfomances to play minecraft **without** **lag**.

**Pure**, a mod that **optimizes** the game to make it more **"pure"** this mod also **optimizes fluidity** while reducing **lag**.

Note that it **isn't only made for peoples with bad harware** using it over other mods is way better, **optimization is key** if you want to push your Minecraft even more while staying at **high FPS count** its perfect!

**If you like this modpack check out the peoples who made it**

https://modrinth.com/organization/shadow-corporation
